steps.title: Convert kilometers to meters
steps.content: Since $1$ kilometer equals $1{,}000$ meters, $90$ kilometers equals $90{,}000$ meters.

steps.title: Convert hours to seconds
steps.content: One hour is $60\times60=3{,}600$ seconds, so $90$ kilometers per hour is the same as $90{,}000$ meters per $3{,}600$ seconds.

steps.title: Find meters per second
steps.content: $$\frac{90{,}000}{3{,}600}=25$$ The equivalent speed is 25 meters per second. Therefore, A is correct.
